name: academorix/rbac
purpose: Role-based access control storage on spatie/laravel-permission — augmented with (application_id, tenant_id) columns and Academorix scope discipline.
capabilities: Role + Permission Eloquent models augmented with scope columns
RoleDefinition metadata layer FK-linked to system roles
Application + tenant scoping on every RBAC row
when_to_use: Every app needs role + permission storage, admin CRUD, and spatie-compatible role/permission checks.
when_not_to_use: For lightweight controller-attribute gating without DB storage, use academorix/authorization.
